title: M9 Salts
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Add 1 L dH 2 O to a clean media bottle
Add 64 g Na 2 HPO 4 -7H 2 O Disodium hydrogen phosphate Contributed by users
Add 15 g KH 2 PO 4 Potassium phosphate (monobasic) P212121
Add 2.5 g NaCl Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234
Add 5 g NH 4 Cl Ammonium Chloride P212121
